headline: Sedition Act used against 4 lawyers representing government critics
context: Four lawyers were investigated under the Sedition Act in 2024 for statements made while representing clients in politically sensitive cases.

cards.big: 4 lawyers investigated for sedition while representing government critics in 2024
cards.sub: Legal profession warns of chilling effect on right to legal representation

cards.big: Legal Profession Act 1976 protects lawyers' right to advocate without fear
cards.sub: Sedition investigations of lawyers undermine attorney-client privilege and duty

cards.big: UN Basic Principles on Role of Lawyers prohibit identification of lawyers with clients
cards.sub: Targeting lawyers for their clients' cases violates international legal standards

cards.big: Malaysian Bar reported 23% decline in lawyers willing to take political cases
cards.sub: When lawyers fear prosecution, accused persons lose access to defence counsel

cards.big: Investigating lawyers for defending clients means the right to counsel is conditional
International Bar Association issued statement of concern in September 2024
